title: Richard Schwartz
blurb: The creator of Internal Family Systems.
lead: The therapist who developed the Internal Family Systems (IFS) model of the mind's 'parts'.

blocks.text: Richard Schwartz developed Internal Family Systems (IFS), which understands the mind as a system of 'parts' centred on a compassionate core Self.
IFS has become widely used, especially in trauma work, for its non-pathologising, compassionate stance.
Free introductory articles from the IFS Institute explain the model and how 'parts work' can help.
